hooks.command: cp /Users/petergirgis/map-hq/CLAUDE.md "/Users/petergirgis/Desktop/claude md backup/CLAUDE_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).md" && echo '{"systemMessage": "✅ CLAUDE.md backed up to Desktop/claude md backup"}' || true

cd /Users/petergirgis/map-hq && git status --porcelain CLAUDE.md 2>/dev/null | grep -q . && echo '{"systemMessage": "⚠️  CLAUDE.md has uncommitted changes — make sure it reflects all code changes made this session before committing."}' || true

cd /Users/petergirgis/map-hq && git status --porcelain agents/ utils/ web/ scripts/ monitor/ .claude/ 2>/dev/null | grep -q . && echo '{"systemMessage": "REMINDER: Uncommitted code changes — run: git add -A && git commit && git push"}' || true
